query: Use the docx skill to produce a contract as a Word .docx with proper tracked-change markup (w:ins/w:del), reviewer comments, and validation that it opens correctly in Word
Use the docx skill to build a polished multi-page Word .docx report with a real updatable table of contents, custom heading styles, and DXA-width tables that render correctly in Word and Google Docs
Use the docx skill to set up a reusable Word .docx template with Jinja2 placeholders that I fill from JSON to generate contracts in bulk, and validate each output
Use the docx skill to build a pipeline that takes untrusted .docx uploads, inspects them for macros and external links, strips metadata and hidden text, and outputs a sanitized safe copy
Use the docx skill to write correct OOXML for accepting some tracked changes and rejecting others by different authors in a Word document, including the deleted-paragraph-mark edge case
Use the docx skill to safely unpack, modify, and repack the raw XML inside existing Word .docx files without corrupting the package or breaking relationships
Use the docx skill to generate a Word .docx with a multi-column layout, a bulleted list using proper numbering definitions, an embedded image with alt text, and a two-column footer
Use the docx skill to convert a batch of legacy .doc files to .docx, then extract their full structure — headings, tables, comments, footnotes — into JSON
Use the docx skill to add threaded comments and replies to a Word document with correct commentRangeStart/End markers and the commentsExtended part for reply threading, then validate it
Use the docx skill to extract media from Word .docx files with embedded scanned images, OCR the scans, and write the recognized text back as alt-text
Use the docx skill to create a Word .docx legal memo with letterhead, numbered clauses, bookmark cross-references, and a signature block, then validate the final package
Use the docx skill's validation script to check ZIP integrity, required OOXML parts, content types, relationship targets, and tracked-change nesting on generated Word files
Use the docx skill to do find-and-replace across an existing Word .docx including inside headers, footers, and tables while preserving every run's formatting
Use the docx skill to produce a Word .docx report from this Markdown while preserving tracked changes, then render a per-page PDF preview
Use the docx skill to remove every trace of authorship from a Word .docx — author, last-modified-by, company, revision history, comments, custom XML — and report what was stripped
Summarise this PDF research article and pull out the key findings
Add a VLOOKUP and a pivot table to this Excel spreadsheet
Design a 12-slide PowerPoint deck with transitions for our product launch
Update the section headings in our live Google Doc and share it with the team
Write a Markdown README and CONTRIBUTING guide for this repo
The receipt is a JPEG photo — OCR it and pull out the line items and total
Merge these PDFs, add bookmarks, and compress the result
Debug why this Python CSV parser drops the last row
Transcribe this meeting audio and save a summary into my Obsidian vault
Build a small React dashboard that charts our sales metrics
